titleStmt.title: SII 20.7: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 7. (B.K. No. 40 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒS11VAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: On a slab fixed into the left wall of the Śaṁkha-basti at Basti-Baṇa.

summary.p: The inscription is dated in Śaka 656, second regnal year of the king, Māgha, Paurṇimā, corresponding to A.D. 735, January 13, which was Thursday.

It records the gift, by the king, of 50 nivarttanas of land, at the request of Bāhubaliśrēshṭhi, for repairs and offerings to Dhavaḷa-Jinālaya, and also for maintenance of a dāna-śālā. The gift was entrusted to Vijayadēva-paṇḍitāchārya of Mūla-saṅgha and Dēva-gaṇa.
Text published in Ind. Ant., Vol. VII, pp. 106-07, text lines 62-82.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti jayatyāviḥkritaṁ viṣṇōrvārāhaṁ kṣōbhi
tārṇṇavaṁ dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgraviśrāntabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . śrīmatāṁ sakaḷabhuvanasaṁstūyamānamānavyasagōtrāṇāṁ hārītiputrāṇāṁ saptalō
kamātṛbhiḥ saptamātṛbhirabhivarddhitānāṁ kārttikēyaparirakṣaṇaprāptakalyāṇaparaṁparāṇāṁ bhagavannārāyaṇaprasādasamāsāditavarāhalāṁ
cchanēkṣaṇa kṣaṇa vaśīkṛtāśēṣamahībhṛtāṁ cāḷukyānāṁ kuḷamaḷaṁkariṣṇōraśvamēdhāvabhṛthasnānapavitrīkṛtagātrasya śrīpolikēśivallabhamahārā
jasya priyasūnuḥ śrīkīrttivarmapṟithvīvallabhamahārājastasyātmajaḥ satyāśraya śrīprathvīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamē
śvarasya priyatanayaḥ prabhāvakuḷiśadaḷitapāṁḍyacōḷakēraḷakadaṁbaprabhṛtibhūbhṛdabhravibhramasya nityāvanatakāṁcīpatimakuṭacuṁbitapā
dāṁbujasya vikramādityasatyāśrayaśrīpṛthvīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvarasya priyasūnuḥ sakaḷōttarāpathanāthamathanōpārjjitapāḷi
dhvajādisamastapāramaiśvaryacihnasya vinayādityasatyāśrayaśrīpṛthvīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvaraparamabhaṭṭārakasya priyātmajassā
hasarasarasikaḥ parāṅmukhīkṛta śatrumaṁḍaḷassakaḷapāramaiśvaryavyaktihētupāḷidhvajādyujvaḷaprājyarājyō vijayādi
tyasatyāśrayaśrīpṛthvīvallabhamahārājādhirājapriyasūnuḥ pratidinapravarddhamānayauvanō ripumaṁḍaḷākrāntarājyābhyudaya
kēsarikiśōravikramaikarasō vikramādityasatyāśrayaśrīpṛthvīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvarabhaṭṭārakasya vijayaskandhāvārē raktapuramadhivasa
ti ṣaṭpaṁcāśaduttaraṣaṭchatēṣu śakavarṣēṣvatītēṣu pravarddhamānavijayarājya saṁvatsarē dvitīyē varttamānē māghapaurṇamāsyāṁ mūlasaṁghānva
yadēvagaṇōditaḥ paramatapaśrutamūrttiviśēkarāmadēvācāryaśiṣyō vijitavipakṣavādijayadēvapaṁḍitāntēvāsi samupagata kavivā
ditvādi śrī vijayadēvapaṁḍitācāryyāya jinapūjābhivṛddhyartthaṁ bāhubaliśrēṣṭhivijñāpanēna purikaranagaryāṁ śaṁkhatīrtthavasatērmaṇḍanamaṁḍitaḥ
tathā dhavaḷajinālayasya jīrṇnōddharaṇaṁ kṛtvā khaṇḍasphuṭitanavasaṁskārabalinimittaṁ dānaśālādipravarttanārtthaṁ taṁ nagarāduttarasyāṁ diśi gavyūtipramā
ṇavyavasthitakarppāṭitaṭākāddakṣiṇasyāṁ diśi rājamānēna śatārddhanivarttanapramāṇakṣētraṁ sarvvabādhāparihāraṁ dattaṁ . tasya sīmā samākhyāyatē
pūrvvadiśi tatsthāpitakinnara pāṣāṇā dakṣiṇasyāmāśāyāṁ dhavaḷapāṣāṇapārśvaśamyaḥ . paścimasyāṁ diśi śvētapāṣāṇādēkaśamī Uttarasyāṁ
[diśi Anī]ḷapāṣāṇātprākprakāśitataṭākātpūrvvasyāṁ diśi Aruṇapāṣāṇātpūrvōktavyaktakiṁnarapāṣāṇapaṁgatā sīmā . © © ©
svaṁ dātuṁ sumahacchakyaṁ duḥkhamanyasya pālanaṁ dānātpāḷanāccēti dānācchrēyōnupāḷanaṁ . bahubhirvvasudhā bhu
stasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . na viṣaṁ viṣamityāhuḥ dēvasvaṁ viṣamucyatē viṣamēkāki
yō harēta vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ varddhatāṁ jina[śāsanaṁ .]
Digital edition of SII 20.7 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
